use_cases: Displaying contextual help or feature information on click
Showing quick info panels for form fields or UI elements
Providing tooltip-style explanations in dashboard interfaces
Triggering disclosure content in settings or configuration panels
Adding informational overlays in documentation or onboarding flows
ai_summary: A lightweight info popover component built with Ark UI that displays contextual information in a bordered panel with title and description. Features a trigger button with focus and hover states, smooth fade animations, and automatic dark mode support. The popover uses a portal for proper z-index stacking and includes an arrow pointing to the trigger element.
